name: Evaluation of Safety and Tolerability of Libella Gene Therapy for Critical Limb Ischemia: AAV-hTERT
short_name: Libella AAV-hTERT critical limb ischemia registry
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov single-arm phase 1 Libella AAV-hTERT registry in critical limb ischemia, listed with unknown overall status, last-known recruiting status, estimated enrollment of 5, estimated completion in December 2020, and no posted results in the June 15, 2026 API view.
